enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether the VulnDB vulnerability analyzer should be enabled.

aliasSyncEnabled.title: Alias Synchronization Enabled
aliasSyncEnabled.description: Whether to include alias information in vulnerability data.

oauth2ClientId.title: OAuth2 Client ID
oauth2ClientId.description: OAuth 2.0 client ID for authentication with the VulnDB REST API.

oauth2ClientSecret.description: OAuth 2.0 client secret for authentication with the VulnDB REST API.
